blocks.text: Arsenal's title test: Chelsea come to the Emirates

Klæbo was untouchable in yesterday's race — Norwegian clean sweep. But Sunday belongs to football: Arsenal lead Man City by 2 points after Liverpool thrashed West Ham 5-2 — Chelsea arrive knowing they can shift everything.
⚽ 18:30 — El Gran Derbi: Sevilla host Real Betis in La Liga's most ferocious local rivalry

blocks.label: 🗓️ Coming Up
items: ⚽ Tue 21:00 — Copa del Rey: Barcelona host Atlético Madrid (trail 4-0 on aggregate — cup exit looms)
⛷️ Thu 16:05 — Biathlon World Cup: Tandrevold, Røiseland & Kirkeeide in 15km Individual
🏒 Wed 18:00 — GET-ligaen Playoffs begin: Storhamar opens quarterfinal campaign
